name: obsidian-mowen-plugin
description: This is a mowen plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md)

scripts.build: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && mkdir -p dist && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css ./dist/
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: ziyou
